venues.name: The Holliday Coffee
venues.description: TikTok's obsession right now and for good reason. The best iced matcha on the Gold Coast, served in peachy cups from 5:30am daily. This sunny corner coffee spot has everyone talking.
venues.mustTry: Strawberry iced matcha (10/10), matcha float, three-cheese jaffles, honeycomb macadamia butter crumpets, avo croissants

venues.name: Bobby Bang's
venues.description: Just opened December 2024 and already blowing up on social media. The Gold Coast's number one matcha spot with hand-whisked ceremonial matcha and Asian-inspired breakfast magic.
venues.mustTry: Miso caramel matcha, strawberry matcha, pork katsu sando, breakfast ramen with crispy bacon, Bobby's Benny with Korean fried chicken

venues.name: Piada Co
venues.description: TikTok went crazy for their pistachio frappe and it's still the talk of the town. Italian-style piadinas (flatbreads) that hit different, perfect post-beach fuel.
venues.mustTry: TikTok-famous pistachio frappe, Italian piadinas with fresh ingredients, iced coffee creations

venues.name: Dayo
venues.description: The new Filipino fusion cafe that literally blew minds with its Ube latte. Despite just opening, it's already garnered a cult following for unique takes on breakfast classics.
venues.mustTry: Viral Ube latte, longganisa breakfast muffins (like a fancy Maccas version), fried chicken & waffles, matcha French toast with strawberry

venues.name: Paddock Bakery
venues.description: Quite possibly the most Instagrammable cafe on the Gold Coast. This lovingly-restored weatherboard cottage with picket fence courtyard has been going viral for its rustic aesthetic and drool-worthy baked goods.
venues.mustTry: Croissants, rustic sourdough, seasonal pastries, specialty coffee in the courtyard

venues.name: The Bread Social
venues.description: The Sundevil Special went viral for a perfectly good reason — this place will ruin supermarket bread for you forever. One of the most impressive pastry cabinets on the entire Gold Coast.
venues.mustTry: Sundevil Special, sweet & savoury seasonal danishes (rosemary lime pineapple), croissants that'll make you cry

venues.name: Bam Bam Bakehouse
venues.description: One of the best breakfast spots on the Gold Coast in 2025. Sleek interior that's among the Coast's most beautiful cafes, with flavoursome dishes and home-baked treats that are pure magic.
venues.mustTry: Jalapeño & queso fresco sweetcorn fritters, nasi goreng breakfast, Nutella choux bombs (non-negotiable), pastries & dessert pots

venues.name: Cheek Café
venues.description: Arrived in 2025 with big flavours, bold personality and peachy-good vibes. This sunny corner spot blends playful design with seriously good coffee and wholesome ingredients inspired by Greek, Italian and Aussie roots.
venues.mustTry: Greek-inspired breakfast dishes, Italian-Australian fusion plates, specialty coffee, wholesome brunch bowls

venues.name: Refinery Coffee
venues.description: Making waves with their viral iced matcha float that's been all over everyone's feed. A Currumbin favourite that knows how to do specialty drinks right.
venues.mustTry: Viral iced matcha float (10/10), specialty coffee, refreshing cold brews

venues.name: Mohr Cafe and Deli
venues.description: Burleigh's newest crush serving Mohr than you'd expect. This late 2025 opening delivers all-day Mediterranean-inspired plates and a deli stacked with grab-and-go goodness — food worth telling the group chat about.
venues.mustTry: Mediterranean lunches, all-day breakfast plates, deli selections, pairs perfectly with Black Hops next door
